overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair descending and ascending stairs through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character walks through covered walkways and open plazas adorned with neon billboards and vending machines before crossing a street.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with highway overlook

events.description: character turns around while descending to look back up the stairs

agents.ego_description: descending wide concrete stairs while holding a drink, with an elevated highway visible to the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking up the stairs in opposite direction

entered.detail: multi-lane highway overpass with moving traffic visible to the right
large illuminated advertisement with pink and purple neon lighting
wide concrete stairway with orange safety markings on edges
teal-colored metal railings lining both sides of the stairway

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide outdoor stairway alongside an elevated highway during golden hour. Warm sunlight bathes the cyberpunk cityscape while neon billboards glow in the background. Other pedestrians walk up the stairs as vehicles pass on the highway to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal fencing

events.description: enters covered walkway from outdoor stairway, lighting becomes darker and more enclosed

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor holding a drink, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction through the corridor

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing cover over the walkway
vertical metal bars and grating forming walls on both sides of the corridor
illuminated advertisement poster featuring a character portrait on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian corridor with metal grate walls on both sides. The environment shifts to a darker, sheltered space with artificial lighting mixing with fading natural light. A large illuminated poster is visible on the far wall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending to upper plaza level

events.description: exits covered corridor back into outdoor sunlight, beginning ascent
reaches top of stairs and transitions to level walking surface

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs back to upper level, emerging into warm golden hour sunlight

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket ascending stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: modern glass and steel building face with multiple stories
series of horizontal digital advertisement screens on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stairs back to the upper plaza level, emerging from the covered walkway into direct golden hour sunlight. Long shadows stretch across the concrete steps as large digital billboards glow on the building facade to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with vending machines leading to street crossing

events.description: approaches crosswalk at intersection, preparing to cross street
begins crossing the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza past vending machines, then crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking alongside and crossing the street

entered.detail: colorful automated vending machines with glowing screens and advertisements
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street
concrete barrier posts lining the edge of the pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open urban plaza lined with trees and bright vending machines. The character walks past concrete structures and digital advertisements before approaching a crosswalk, then crosses the street alongside other pedestrians as vehicles wait nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that transitions from open, sun-drenched stairs into a sheltered corridor before returning to a bright city plaza. It begins with the character descending a wide outdoor stairway bathed in warm golden hour light, with vehicles passing on an adjacent elevated highway. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a darker, covered pedestrian corridor where artificial lighting replaces the sun and metal grate walls flank the path toward a distant illuminated poster. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a second set of stairs, emerging from the shadows back into the direct glow of the afternoon sun and the light of massive digital billboards. Finally, the environment opens into a wide plaza lined with trees and vending machines, moving past concrete structures before crossing a busy street alongside other pedestrians.
